category_sources: Official Traefik docs describe Traefik as an open-source Application Proxy that routes requests to services and auto-discovers configuration.
display_name_sources: Official docs and GitHub repository use Traefik.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points to doc.traefik.io/traefik for complete documentation.
Official docs site provides product documentation, getting started, setup, routing, security, and reference sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; repo intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official Traefik docs mention service discovery, routing, Kubernetes, Docker, and providers.
